title: Add bundle registry cache invalidation
goal: Replace runtime-only merge semantics for latest_complete_bundles with an explicit bundle registry cache strategy that records manifest-directory mtime or equivalent invalidation evidence.

acceptance.assertion: Cache metadata records enough evidence to decide whether discovery is needed without scanning live manifests on every valid cache read.
Stale, missing and valid legacy rows have documented behavior and tests.
Output continues to state what registry authority does not establish, including live repo freshness and claim truth.
Focused tests cover valid cache, stale cache, missing cache and live discovery additions.

metadata.reason: PR #103 fixed immediate stale-row semantics but did not implement a durable cache invalidation model.
